name: Service Stop Commands
description: Detects stopping of critical services which may indicate sabotage
query:
// Service Disruption Detection
// Critical services being stopped
events from endpoint
where (process_name = "sc.exe" and command_line contains "stop")
  or (process_name = "net.exe" and command_line contains "stop")
  or (process_name = "systemctl" and command_line contains "stop")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) > 5
within 300 seconds
